requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity Obligations — Georgia Cybersecurity Law (2012), CERT.GOV.GE, and Connected Device Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全义务——《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》（2012年）、CERT.GOV.GE及联网设备要求
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全義務——《喬治亞網路安全法》（2012年）、CERT.GOV.GE及聯網裝置要求

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices connected to Georgian networks and consumers must comply with cybersecurity obligations under the Law of Georgia on Information Security (Cybersecurity Law, 2012, as amended). The national cybersecurity framework is administered by CERT.GOV.GE (Computer Emergency Response Team of Georgia), operating under the Data Exchange Agency (DEA), and the Cyber Security Bureau within the State Security Service of Georgia (SSSG). The Cybersecurity Law establishes obligations for critical information system operators and imposes baseline cybersecurity requirements on networked devices and services. Connected wireless devices (Wi-Fi routers, cellular IoT, smart home devices) may be subject to baseline security requirements including prohibition of default or hardcoded credentials, mandatory firmware update mechanisms, secure communication protocols, and vulnerability disclosure obligations for importers and distributors. Georgia's EU Association Agreement alignment is progressively driving convergence with EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) principles, though formal CRA adoption is not yet complete. Georgian authorities may require cybersecurity documentation or declarations as part of the GNCC type approval or market access process for connected devices. Chinese exporters should ensure connected devices do not present documented security vulnerabilities and provide firmware update support for devices placed on the Georgian market.
summary.zh: 连接到格鲁吉亚网络和消费者使用的无线及物联网设备，须遵守《格鲁吉亚信息安全法》（网络安全法，2012年，经修订）规定的网络安全义务。国家网络安全框架由CERT.GOV.GE（格鲁吉亚计算机应急响应小组，隶属于数据交换署DEA）及格鲁吉亚国家安全局（SSSG）下设的网络安全局负责管理。《网络安全法》为关键信息系统运营商设立义务，并对联网设备和服务规定了基线网络安全要求。联网无线设备（Wi-Fi路由器、蜂窝物联网、智能家居设备）可能须满足基线安全要求，包括禁止默认或硬编码凭证、强制固件更新机制、安全通信协议，以及进口商和经销商的漏洞披露义务。格鲁吉亚与欧盟联系协议接轨正推动与欧盟《网络弹性法案》（CRA）原则逐步融合，但正式采纳尚未完成。格鲁吉亚主管机构可能要求在联网设备的GNCC型号核准或市场准入程序中提供网络安全文件或声明。中国出口商应确保联网设备不存在已记录的安全漏洞，并为投放格鲁吉亚市场的设备提供固件更新支持。
summary.zht: 連接到喬治亞網路和消費者使用的無線及物聯網裝置，須遵守《喬治亞信息安全法》（網路安全法，2012年，經修訂）規定的網路安全義務。國家網路安全框架由CERT.GOV.GE（喬治亞計算機應急響應小組，隸屬於數據交換署DEA）及喬治亞國家安全局（SSSG）下設的網路安全局負責管理。《網路安全法》為關鍵信息系統運營商設立義務，並對聯網裝置和服務規定了基線網路安全要求。聯網無線裝置（Wi-Fi路由器、蜂窩物聯網、智慧家居裝置）可能須滿足基線安全要求，包括禁止預設或硬編碼憑證、強制韌體更新機制、安全通信協議，以及進口商和經銷商的漏洞披露義務。喬治亞與歐盟聯繫協議接軌正推動與歐盟《網路韌性法案》（CRA）原則逐步融合，但正式採納尚未完成。喬治亞主管機構可能要求在聯網裝置的GNCC型號核准或市場准入程序中提供網路安全文件或聲明。中國出口商應確保聯網裝置不存在已記錄的安全漏洞，並為投放喬治亞市場的裝置提供韌體更新支援。

standards_or_laws: Law of Georgia on Information Security (Cybersecurity Law, 2012, as amended) — baseline cybersecurity obligations for networked systems and devices in Georgia
CERT.GOV.GE (Computer Emergency Response Team of Georgia, under Data Exchange Agency / DEA) — national cybersecurity incident response and coordination authority
Cyber Security Bureau, State Security Service of Georgia (SSSG) — national cybersecurity policy and critical infrastructure protection
EU Association Agreement / DCFTA — convergence with EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) principles underway; not yet formally transposed
GNCC type approval process — cybersecurity declarations or documentation may be required for connected wireless devices

summary.en: Chinese connected wireless and IoT devices are subject to cybersecurity requirements under China's Cybersecurity Law (2017), the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021), the Data Security Law (DSL, 2021), and MIIT IoT security standards. China's Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS 2.0) applies to network operators and connected systems. MIIT and CISA (Cybersecurity Administration of China) oversee connected device security. Chinese cybersecurity certifications and compliance documentation are not recognised by Georgian authorities and do not substitute for Georgia Cybersecurity Law obligations. Chinese manufacturers must assess whether their connected devices meet Georgian cybersecurity baseline requirements separately from Chinese compliance.
summary.zh: 中国联网无线及物联网设备须遵守《网络安全法》（2017年）、《个人信息保护法》（PIPL，2021年）、《数据安全法》（DSL，2021年）及工业和信息化部物联网安全标准规定的网络安全要求。中国网络安全等级保护制度（等保2.0）适用于网络运营者和联网系统。工业和信息化部及网络安全和信息化委员会（CISA）负责监管联网设备安全。中国网络安全认证及合规文件不被格鲁吉亚主管机构承认，不可替代《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》义务。中国制造商须单独评估其联网设备是否满足格鲁吉亚网络安全基线要求，与中国合规相互独立。
summary.zht: 中國聯網無線及物聯網裝置須遵守《網路安全法》（2017年）、《個人信息保護法》（PIPL，2021年）、《數據安全法》（DSL，2021年）及工業和信息化部物聯網安全標準規定的網路安全要求。中國網路安全等級保護制度（等保2.0）適用於網路運營者和聯網系統。工業和信息化部及網絡安全和信息化委員會（CISA）負責監管聯網裝置安全。中國網路安全認證及合規文件不被喬治亞主管機構承認，不可替代《喬治亞網路安全法》義務。中國製造商須單獨評估其聯網裝置是否滿足喬治亞網路安全基線要求，與中國合規相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017) — national cybersecurity obligations for network operators and connected devices in China
Personal Information Protection Law of China (PIPL, 2021) — data protection obligations for connected devices handling personal data in China
MIIT IoT security technical standards — baseline security requirements for IoT devices sold in China
Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS 2.0, GB/T 22239-2019) — China graded cybersecurity protection framework for networked systems

gap.en: Chinese cybersecurity certifications and MLPS compliance are not recognised by Georgian authorities and do not satisfy Georgia Cybersecurity Law obligations. Connected wireless devices (Wi-Fi routers, cellular IoT modules, smart devices) exported to Georgia must be assessed for compliance with Georgian cybersecurity baseline requirements, including the absence of hardcoded or default credentials, availability of firmware updates, and secure communication protocols. Georgia's DCFTA alignment with EU cybersecurity standards (including Cyber Resilience Act principles) means EU-oriented security design practices are increasingly expected. Chinese exporters should prepare cybersecurity documentation or declarations for connected devices as part of the GNCC type approval and market entry process. As Georgia's cybersecurity regulatory framework continues to evolve in alignment with EU standards, requirements for connected devices are expected to become more detailed and prescriptive over time.
gap.zh: 中国网络安全认证及等保合规不被格鲁吉亚主管机构承认，不满足《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》义务。出口至格鲁吉亚的联网无线设备（Wi-Fi路由器、蜂窝物联网模块、智能设备）须评估是否符合格鲁吉亚网络安全基线要求，包括不存在硬编码或默认凭证、提供固件更新、采用安全通信协议。格鲁吉亚DCFTA与欧盟网络安全标准（包括《网络弹性法案》原则）的接轨，意味着越来越期望采用面向欧盟的安全设计实践。中国出口商应在GNCC型号核准及市场准入程序中为联网设备准备网络安全文件或声明。随着格鲁吉亚网络安全监管框架继续向欧盟标准靠拢，联网设备的要求预计将随时间推移变得更加详细和规范。
gap.zht: 中國網路安全認證及等保合規不被喬治亞主管機構承認，不滿足《喬治亞網路安全法》義務。出口至喬治亞的聯網無線裝置（Wi-Fi路由器、蜂窩物聯網模組、智慧裝置）須評估是否符合喬治亞網路安全基線要求，包括不存在硬編碼或預設憑證、提供韌體更新、採用安全通信協議。喬治亞DCFTA與歐盟網路安全標準（包括《網路韌性法案》原則）的接軌，意味著越來越期望採用面向歐盟的安全設計實踐。中國出口商應在GNCC型號核准及市場准入程序中為聯網裝置準備網路安全文件或聲明。隨著喬治亞網路安全監管框架繼續向歐盟標準靠攏，聯網裝置的要求預計將隨時間推移變得更加詳細和規範。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (baseline) — Georgia Cybersecurity Law (2012) imposes cybersecurity obligations on networked devices and systems; connected wireless devices must meet baseline security requirements; detailed product-specific rules are evolving under EU DCFTA alignment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Cybersecurity Law (2017), PIPL (2021), and MIIT IoT security standards impose cybersecurity obligations on connected devices sold in China; MLPS 2.0 applies to network operators

source.publisher: CERT.GOV.GE — Computer Emergency Response Team of Georgia (Data Exchange Agency / DEA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connected wireless and IoT devices exported to Georgia must comply with the Georgia Cybersecurity Law (2012) and CERT.GOV.GE framework. Chinese MLPS and cybersecurity certifications are not recognised. Devices must demonstrate absence of hardcoded/default credentials, provide firmware update mechanisms, and use secure protocols. Georgia's DCFTA alignment with EU Cyber Resilience Act principles means EU-oriented security design is increasingly expected. Cybersecurity documentation or declarations should be prepared for GNCC type approval applications for connected devices.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口至格鲁吉亚的联网无线及物联网设备须遵守《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE框架。中国等保及网络安全认证不被承认。设备须证明不存在硬编码/默认凭证，提供固件更新机制，并使用安全协议。格鲁吉亚DCFTA与欧盟《网络弹性法案》原则接轨，意味着越来越期望面向欧盟的安全设计。联网设备的GNCC型号核准申请中应准备网络安全文件或声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口至喬治亞的聯網無線及物聯網裝置須遵守《喬治亞網路安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE框架。中國等保及網路安全認證不被承認。裝置須證明不存在硬編碼/預設憑證，提供韌體更新機制，並使用安全協議。喬治亞DCFTA與歐盟《網路韌性法案》原則接軌，意味著越來越期望面向歐盟的安全設計。聯網裝置的GNCC型號核准申請中應準備網路安全文件或聲明。
